title: Positive Potato Original Emotional Support Gift (Grouch)
features: 🧵 Hand-Stitched Charm – Each plush has a handmade effect, making it extra cozy and unique. Comes in its own potato bag for a special gift
📏 Perfect Size – Super Cute 9cm in gift box
🌈 Four Wholesome Varieties – Each with a different uplifting message to brighten your day.
🥔 Sweetie Potato Edition – “99% sweetness & light, 1% chaos & sass” – just like you!
🥑 Avocado Cheer – “You’ve totally guac this!” for a boost of motivation.
🥔 Little Motivator – “I may be just a potato, but I believe in you” – because even potatoes have dreams!
🔥 Reassuring Humor – “It’s fine. You’re fine. Everything’s fine.” – The perfect plush for life’s chaotic moments.
🎁 Perfect Gift Idea – A cute and quirky way to spread positivity to friends, family, or yourself!

About the Creator She may not have been born with a crochet hook in her hand, but when her adorable nephew came into this world, Auntie Bex knew I had to create something special for him. Armed with a crochet hook and a video tutorial, she lovingly crafted a tiny blue bootie. It took her over two hours and she still had to create the matching pair. But she persevered! Flash forward a few years and her nephew, and his siblings, have very much out grown those booties. But Bex has not outgrown crochet. She started making cute amigurumi characters and eventually birthed into being, the amazing Positive Potato. Steve the Positive Potato was created in July 2022 and was a smash hit (see what he did there!). In fact he was so popular that some pesky copycats copied his image with some pretty shocking clones. Bex has been fearlessly fighting for Steve with some amazing allies she has picked up along the way. PMS are working alongside Bex to bring Positive Potato to a worldwide audience, spreading love and positivity around the world!
